programme.title: Protagonista
programme.desc: O sucesso desportivo mede-se pelos títulos e pelas conquistas, mas há sempre algo que os protagonistas deixam por dizer, na hora da vitória. A marca que deixam, como se preparam para o sucesso, os segredos mais bem guardados de quem nasceu para ganhar. Histórias de sucesso, forradas de benfiquismo em meia hora de conversa.

programme.title: As Lanças Apontadas
programme.desc: Em hora e meia moderada por Ricardo Palacin, é feita a análise à atualidade desportiva com especial enfoque no que é importante para o Sport Lisboa e Benfica. Desporto, mas não só. O que é certa é a defesa do Sport Lisboa e Benfica.

programme.title: Carlos Manuel
programme.desc: Programa focado na obra e na carreira de uma das maiores figuras do Sport Lisboa e Benfica. Carlos Manuel, tal qual era, na visão jornalística de Leonor Pinhão. O craque, as épocas, os treinadores, os atletas lembrados por quem tinha de escrever páginas sobre o Sport Lisboa e Benfica, no jornal A Bola. Carlos Manuel e Leonor Pinhão, com a moderação de Ricardo Palacin.

programme.title: Uma Semana Do Melhor
programme.desc: João Martins, João Gonçalves, João Tomaz e José Marques da Costa conversam sobre os temas quentes da semana desportiva, falam de momentos históricos do clube e elegem o melhor (e o pior) da semana. Futebol com humor.

programme.title: Benfica Fanzone
programme.desc: Benfica Fanzone

programme.title: História Agora
programme.desc: Rúbrica da BTV, em parceria com o Museu Benfica – Cosme Damião e o Departamento de Património Cultural do Sport Lisboa e Benfica. Todas as semanas, é apresentado um símbolo, desde troféus históricos a relíquias do passado com valor sentimental para os sócios e simpatizantes do clube, que seguirá depois para exposição durante a semana nas instalações do Museu Benfica - Cosme Damião.

programme.desc: Um dos veículos mais míticos da história do Benfica, a Carrinha do Bento, o transporte do “grupo do Barreiro”, vai percorrer o país à procura das melhores histórias, dos protagonistas e da recuperação de momentos incríveis do SL Benfica. programme.title: DAZN F1
programme.desc: Ao quarto Grande Prémio da Temporada, a McLaren conquistou o maior número de pontos deste ano e, pela primeira vez, foi a equipa que mais pontuou, fruto do 1-2 na Sprint e de um 2-3 no Grande Prémio. Será este o indicador de que a McLaren voltou? É daqui que partimos para a conversa com Lourenço Beirão da Veiga, João Amaral, João Carlos Costa com moderação de Óscar Góis.

programme.title: Greatest Classics T1 - Ep. 49
programme.desc: In this episode, the newly crowned IBF Lightweight World Champion, Shane Mosley, makes the first defense of the title he claimed from Phillip Holiday just three months earlier. He would face a tough competitor in Manuel Gomez of Laredo, Mexico, who would give the new champion a difficult test.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! T1 - Ep. 20
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Juan Manuel Marquez vs. Juan Diaz with three lightweight titles on the line. This fight earned Fight of the Year honors from The Ring magazine. Also on the card, heavyweight kickboxing action.

programme.title: MEGA Fights T1 - Ep. 54
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features Jermain 'Bad Intentions' Taylor (27-0, 17 KOs) making the 5th defense of his WBC and WBO Middleweight Titles, this time against upstart Kelly 'The Ghost' Pavlik (31-0, 28 KOs) on September 29, 2007 at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA.

programme.title: Saturday Encore Presentation T2026 - Ep. 502
programme.desc: From the T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas, two of the top fighters in their division meet when undefeated WBC Light Heavyweight World Champion David Benavidez moves up in weight and puts his 31-0 record on the line to take on WBO Cruiserweight World Champion, 48-1 Gilberto 'Zurdo' Ramirez. In the Co-Feature, another world class matchup takes place when Jose Armando Resendiz meets hard-hitting former champion Jamie Munguia.

programme.title: Introducing: T1 - Ep. 1
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS Presents 'Introducing:', a new original documentary series that covers the current stars of today and rising stars of tomorrow. Each episode we get an up close and personal perspective of their lives and see what drives them to be the best at what they do. Introducing: Caitlin Dechelle, provides an intimate look at one of the most dominant women in the history of martial arts tournaments.

programme.title: MMA:30 T1 - Ep. 6
programme.desc: This episode brings you behind the scenes at the UFC Fan Expo with current UFC roster members Wanderlei Silva, Frank Mir and Donald 'Cowboy' Cerrone. Two of the top corner men in the sport breakdown an MMA fight before our eyes. MMA:30 interviews the most popular ring girl in the game today, Arianny Celeste as she talks about her own MMA training exclusively on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA T1 - Ep. 126
programme.desc: This episode features coverage of mixed martial arts headlined by a welterweight title fight between Dricus du Plessis and Martin Van Staden. Bonus coverage includes a lightweight battle between Mthobisi Buthelezi and Luke Michael and a bantamweight clash between Bill Thusi and Tjaart Henning.

programme.desc: Delivering the untold stories behind some of the most exciting fights in the sport, FIGHT SPORTS brings you 'Return to the Ring'. In this original documentary series, we sit with the participants from some of boxing's most interesting bouts, including the fighters, trainers, officials and promoters that contributed to each event.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! T1 - Ep. 34
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the first encounter between Sergio Martinez and Paul Williams. The bout is closely contested throughout and was pegged as a Fight of the Year candidate for 2009.

programme.title: WCCB: Dina Thorslund vs. Seren Cetin T2025 - Ep. 525
programme.desc: WBC & WBO Women's Bantamweight World Champion Dina Thorslund puts her titles and undefeated record on the line in front of her hometown fans at the Royal Arena in Copenhagen, Denmark, taking on top contender and undefeated challenger Seren Cetin of Turkey. Thorslund has held World Championship gold for over five years, including seven defenses of the WBO World Title before adding the WBC Championship in September.

programme.title: Judo for the World T1 - Ep. 13
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Abu Dhabi Grand Slam on world Judo day, we speak to double world champion Mayra Aguiar about the unity of the Brazilian judo team, and watch as two world champions battle for gold in the -57kg division.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights T3 - Ep. 47
programme.desc: This episode features a super middleweight brawl between top contenders Adonis Stevenson and Jesus Gonzales that includes a Knockout of the Year candidate, as well as kickboxing, sumo, arm wrestling and more!.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! T1 - Ep. 51
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a battle of multiple-weight world champions, as Juan Manuel Marquez challenges Marco Antonio Barrera for the WBC super featherweight title.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo T25 - Ep. 1
programme.desc: Top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 1 features Hakuho, Endo, Okinoumi and Yutakayamai from the Osaka Prefectural Gymnasium, in Osaka, Japan. .

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts T9 - Ep. 1
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Women's Weapons Championship at the ISKA US Open Championships held at Disney World, Orlando, FL, USA.

programme.title: MMA:30 T1 - Ep. 5
programme.desc: This episode features a look at how John Alessio, a MMA veteran of almost 20 years, prepares for an upcoming fight. We head inside the kitchen of one of MMA's leading nutritionists, Mike Dolce, to find out what are the approved foods in the Dolce Diet. Melvin Guillard summons his inner daredevil and jumps off the Stratosphere in Las Vegas, plus much more.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA T2025 - Ep. 4
programme.desc: This episode features the rematch of Igeu 'Smiley' Kabesa and Reinaldo 'Guerreiro' Ekson. Ekson is only one of two men to have beaten Igeu Kabesa. Don't miss this anticpated rematch, only on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: WCCB: Dina Thorslund vs. Seren Cetin T2025 - Ep. 525
programme.desc: WBC & WBO Women's Bantamweight World Champion Dina Thorslund puts her titles and undefeated record on the line in front of her hometown fans at the Royal Arena in Copenhagen, Denmark, taking on top contender and undefeated challenger Seren Cetin of Turkey. Thorslund has held World Championship gold for over five years, including seven defenses of the WBO World Title before adding the WBC Championship in September.
